title: pelargonium coriandrifolium
intro: Pelargonium coriandrifolium, also known as lemon leaf or lemon-scented geranium, is a species of succulent plant that belongs to the family Geraniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium coriandrifolium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties.
